description: A source document, section, or chunk of content that serves as a reference for knowledge extraction

title.description: Title of the document or section

document_type.description: Type of document (e.g., specification, tutorial, API reference, README, design doc)

author.description: Author or maintainer of the document

sections.description: Top-level sections or major topics covered in the document

summary.description: Brief summary of the document's content and purpose
